The outfit guaranteed to make a statement. Brought to you in our exclusive rose leopard print in chiffon fabric with a slight stretch to it, this little set will be your go to. Pair her with cowboy boots for the ultimate Ibiza fit, or style her with heels and a sparkly bag for a more dressy evening look. We’re obsessed.

  • Soft chiffon fabric
  • Elasticated bandeau - elastic along the top & bottom, and on the top of the sleeve 
  • Tiered layered bell sleeve
  • Contrast stitching
  • Set sold separately 
  • Style with our matching lace up eyelet skirt
